verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable answer immediately: "use an ORM/query-builder for most new Node APIs"; B starts broadly with "default to a typed query layer" then gives the tool recommendation next.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more cleanly by situation: "solo/small team shipping CRUD fast → Prisma" and "SQL-comfortable team or join-heavy domain → Drizzle"; A gives a solid hybrid but leans into a broader survey.
verdict.fabrication: A makes an unsupported precise split: "ORM for 90% of routes, raw SQL...10%"; B has tool claims but no invented statistics.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it maps concrete contexts to picks: "CRUD fast → Prisma", "join-heavy domain → Drizzle", "reporting-dominated API → raw SQL".
